problem id: 1f6c2fd9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  11000011 -> 10000110
  10101111 -> 01000101
  01100100 -> 00000000
  11000010 -> 10000100
  11011101 -> 00000010
  11111110 -> 10000101
  00101101 -> 01000000
  01101010 -> 10000000
  11001101 -> 00000010

query: 10011100
predicted answer: 00000000
